challenges.title: Implement Keyboard-Only Focus
challenges.description: Add accessible focus styles to a navigation menu that only appear during keyboard navigation.
challenges.hint: Use :focus-visible. Don't set outline: none without a replacement.

challenges.title: Focus Management for a Modal Dialog
challenges.description: Build a modal dialog with proper focus management: trap focus inside, focus the first focusable element, close on Escape, and return focus to the trigger.
challenges.starterCode:
Confirm

Are you sure?
challenges.hint: On open, save the trigger element reference. On close, call trigger.focus().

challenges.title: Custom Tabs Component with Roving Tabindex
challenges.description: Build an accessible tabs component using the roving tabindex pattern: only the active tab is in tab order, arrow keys switch tabs, and focus moves appropriately.
challenges.starterCode:
Content 1
Content 2
Content 3
challenges.hint: Set tabindex='0' on the active tab and tabindex='-1' on others. Use ArrowLeft/ArrowRight to switch. Use Home/End for first/last.
